description: Group VS Code's Open Recent entries by remote route — Tunnel, WSL, SSH, Dev Container — in a Tree View for triage and cleanup.
view.recentByRemote.title: Recent by Remote
view.tree.name: Recently Opened
command.refresh.title: Recent by Remote: Refresh
command.open.title: Recent by Remote: Open...
command.openEntry.title: Open
command.openEntryInNewWindow.title: Open in New Window
command.removeEntry.title: Remove from Recent
command.groupByType.title: Recent by Remote: Group by Type (Workspaces / Files)
command.groupByRemote.title: Recent by Remote: Group by Remote Only
command.toggleGroupMode.title: Recent by Remote: Toggle Group Mode
config.clickAction.description: Action when a row in the Recent by Remote tree is clicked.
config.clickAction.openHere: Open with VS Code's native window routing (focuses an existing window with a matching authority, otherwise spawns a new one — same behavior as VS Code's stock Open Recent).
config.clickAction.openInNewWindow: Always open the entry in a new window. The right-click menu's 'Open' item still uses the native routing.
